title: vriesea cereicola
intro: Vriesea cereicola, also known as the 'Ceramic Bromeliad', is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vriesea cereicola include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as its potential use in managing digestive problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments.
